description_long: A muscular adult male figure is depicted wearing ancient warrior attire, including a detailed bronze helmet with a nose guard and cheek plates. He is bare-chested, with a short, armored skirt made of layered leather strips and metallic accents, and his lower legs are protected by strapped greaves. In his left hand, he holds a large, round shield adorned with a raised central boss and decorative motifs, while his right hand wields a spiked flail with a chain. The figure's feet are clad in strapped sandals, and a tattoo is visible on his upper left arm. The overall appearance is that of a gladiator or ancient soldier, with a focus on historical combat gear and minimal clothing.
description: A muscular adult male dressed as an ancient warrior, wearing a helmet, armored skirt, strapped sandals, and holding a shield and spiked flail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the helmeted face, bare chest, shield in left hand, and flail in right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the round shield's detailed face and the profile of the helmet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the helmet, skirt, and the flail hanging down.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the flail's chain and spiked ball, as well as the side profile of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: ancient warrior armor with helmet, armored skirt, and strapped greaves
